The plant is used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. Geochorda glechomoides is native to the tropical regions of Africa, specifically in countries such as South Africa, Kenya, and Tanzania.
